local-only.purpose: Use only user-provided local materials such as resumes, JDs, projects, and notes.

web-assisted.purpose: Use sourced external materials to improve realism for future interview workflows.
web-assisted.deferred_note: Planned after v0.1. Reserved for external, sourced interview material support.

deep-research.purpose: Run deeper interview trend analysis by role, stack, company type, and source recency.
deep-research.deferred_note: Planned after v0.1. Reserved for deeper interview trend analysis.
